sections.paragraph: m. ἅπ. λεγόμ. a suspected reading, Exo 17:16. It is commonly taken to be the same as כִּסֵּא a throne, which is the word actually found in the Samaritan copy. But the context, and the words of verse 15 Exo 17:15 (יְהֹוָה נִסִּי), almost demand that we should read נֵס a standard. [Let the reader judge for himself of this necessity.]
